title: Bitfarms Ltd Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets via StockAnalysis
text: StockAnalysis provides Bitfarms stock forecast and analyst price targets compilation. The platform aggregates analyst coverage showing consensus rating, price target ranges, and earnings estimates. Bitfarms analyst price targets span from low forecasts around $4.18 to high forecasts near $7.00, reflecting divergent analyst views on company valuation and growth prospects. Consensus Buy rating indicates overall positive outlook from covering analysts. Historical analyst estimate revisions tracked changes to revenue and earnings per share projections following quarterly earnings releases and strategic announcements. The forecast section includes 12-month and longer-term price targets reflecting analyst views on company's HPC/AI transformation success and Bitcoin mining profitability. Earnings growth estimates projected revenue expansion from HPC/AI infrastructure operations contrasted against potential Bitcoin mining wind-down impacts. Valuation models incorporated multiple approaches including comparable company analysis and discounted cash flow analysis. Price target changes and estimate revisions provided signals of analyst sentiment toward company execution risk, competitive positioning, and market opportunity assessment.
